system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.dqt_thongke_soluong_totalbyday","body":"
CREATE PROC [dbo].[DQT_THONGKE_SOLUONG_TOTALBYDAY](@YEAR INT, @MONTH INT)
AS
SELECT A.ngaythang, A.nguyenlieu
	, SUM(A.sokhoi_phoi_soche) phoi_soche
	, SUM(A.sokhoi_phoi) phoi
	, SUM(A.sokhoi_nham) nham
	, SUM(A.sokhoi_van) van
	, SUM(A.sokhoi_dinhhinh) dinhhinh
	, SUM(A.sokhoi_laprap) laprap
FROM (
SELECT CAST(A.ngaythang AS DATE) ngaythang
	, B.nguyenlieu
	, SUM(A.soluong) soluong_phoi_soche
	, SUM(A.sokhoi) sokhoi_phoi_soche
	, 0 as soluong_phoi
	, 0 as sokhoi_phoi
	, 0 as soluong_nham
	, 0 as sokhoi_nham
	, 0 as soluong_van
	, 0 as sokhoi_van
	, 0 as soluong_dinhhinh
	, 0 as sokhoi_dinhhinh
	, 0 as soluong_laprap
	, 0 as sokhoi_laprap
FROM dqt_nhap_soluong A
	INNER JOIN tr_dinhmuc_govan B ON A.masp1 = B.masp AND A.mact = B.mact
WHERE YEAR(A.ngaythang) = @YEAR
	AND MONTH(A.ngaythang) = @MONTH
	AND A.congdoan IN ('PHOSC')
	AND A.IsInOut = 0
GROUP BY B.nguyenlieu, CAST(A.ngaythang AS DATE)
UNION ALL
SELECT CAST(A.ngaythang AS DATE) ngaythang
	, B.nguyenlieu
	, 0 as soluong_phoi_soche
	, 0 as sokhoi_phoi_soche
	, SUM(A.soluong) soluong_phoi
	, SUM(A.sokhoi) sokhoi_phoi
	, 0 as soluong_nham
	, 0 as sokhoi_nham
	, 0 as soluong_van
	, 0 as sokhoi_van
	, 0 as soluong_dinhhinh
	, 0 as sokhoi_dinhhinh
	, 0 as soluong_laprap
	, 0 as sokhoi_laprap
FROM dqt_nhap_soluong A
	INNER JOIN tr_dinhmuc_govan B ON A.masp1 = B.masp AND A.mact = B.mact
WHERE YEAR(A.ngaythang) = @YEAR
	AND MONTH(A.ngaythang) = @MONTH
	AND A.congdoan IN ('PHO', 'DPH')
	AND A.IsInOut = 0
GROUP BY B.nguyenlieu, CAST(A.ngaythang AS DATE)
UNION ALL
SELECT CAST(A.ngaythang AS DATE) ngaythang
	, B.nguyenlieu
	, 0 as soluong_phoi_soche
	, 0 as sokhoi_phoi_soche
	, 0 soluong_phoi
	, 0 sokhoi_phoi
	, SUM(A.soluong) as soluong_nham
	, SUM(A.sokhoi) as sokhoi_nham
	, 0 as soluong_van
	, 0 as sokhoi_van
	, 0 as soluong_dinhhinh
	, 0 as sokhoi_dinhhinh
	, 0 as soluong_laprap
	, 0 as sokhoi_laprap
FROM dqt_nhap_soluong A
	INNER JOIN tr_dinhmuc_govan B ON A.masp1 = B.masp AND A.mact = B.mact
WHERE YEAR(A.ngaythang) = @YEAR
	AND MONTH(A.ngaythang) = @MONTH
	AND A.congdoan IN ('NHA', 'NMA')
	AND A.IsInOut = 0
GROUP BY B.nguyenlieu, CAST(A.ngaythang AS DATE)
UNION ALL
SELECT CAST(A.ngaythang AS DATE) ngaythang
	, B.nguyenlieu
	, 0 as soluong_phoi_soche
	, 0 as sokhoi_phoi_soche
	, 0 as soluong_phoi
	, 0 as sokhoi_phoi
	, 0 as soluong_nham
	, 0 as sokhoi_nham
	, SUM(A.soluong) as soluong_van
	, SUM(A.sokhoi) as sokhoi_van
	, 0 as soluong_dinhhinh
	, 0 as sokhoi_dinhhinh
	, 0 as soluong_laprap
	, 0 as sokhoi_laprap
FROM dqt_nhap_soluong A
	INNER JOIN tr_dinhmuc_govan B ON A.masp1 = B.masp AND A.mact = B.mact
WHERE YEAR(A.ngaythang) = @YEAR
	AND MONTH(A.ngaythang) = @MONTH
	AND A.congdoan IN ('VAN')
	AND A.IsInOut = 0
GROUP BY B.nguyenlieu, CAST(A.ngaythang AS DATE)
UNION ALL
SELECT CAST(A.ngaythang AS DATE) ngaythang
	, B.nguyenlieu
	, 0 as soluong_phoi_soche
	, 0 as sokhoi_phoi_soche
	, 0 soluong_phoi
	, 0 sokhoi_phoi
	, 0 as soluong_nham
	, 0 as sokhoi_nham
	, 0 as soluong_van
	, 0 as sokhoi_van
	, SUM(A.soluong) as soluong_dinhhinh
	, SUM(A.sokhoi) as sokhoi_dinhhinh
	, 0 as soluong_laprap
	, 0 as sokhoi_laprap
FROM dqt_nhap_soluong A
	INNER JOIN tr_dinhmuc_govan B ON A.masp1 = B.masp AND A.mact = B.mact
WHERE YEAR(A.ngaythang) = @YEAR
	AND MONTH(A.ngaythang) = @MONTH
	AND A.congdoan IN ('DHI')
	AND A.IsInOut = 0
GROUP BY B.nguyenlieu, CAST(A.ngaythang AS DATE)
UNION ALL
SELECT CAST(A.ngaythang AS DATE) ngaythang
	, B.nguyenlieu
	, 0 as soluong_phoi_soche
	, 0 as sokhoi_phoi_soche
	, 0 soluong_phoi
	, 0 sokhoi_phoi
	, 0 as soluong_nham
	, 0 as sokhoi_nham
	, 0 as soluong_van
	, 0 as sokhoi_van
	, 0 as soluong_dinhhinh
	, 0 as sokhoi_dinhhinh
	, SUM(A.soluong) as soluong_laprap
	, SUM(A.sokhoi) as sokhoi_laprap
FROM dqt_nhap_soluong A
	INNER JOIN tr_dinhmuc_govan B ON A.masp1 = B.masp AND A.mact = B.mact
WHERE YEAR(A.ngaythang) = @YEAR
	AND MONTH(A.ngaythang) = @MONTH
	AND A.congdoan IN ('LRA')
	AND A.IsInOut = 0
GROUP BY B.nguyenlieu, CAST(A.ngaythang AS DATE)
) A
GROUP BY A.ngaythang, A.nguyenlieu
ORDER BY A.ngaythang

","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.dqt_nhap_soluong","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
